extracted_items.content: Architecture: modular monolith approach. Extract services only when there is a clear scaling need.
API: GraphQL with Apollo Server for multi-client support (web, mobile, third-party integrations).
Authentication: OAuth2 with PKCE for all clients. JWT tokens with RS256 algorithm. No API key authentication for first-party clients.
Search infrastructure: Elasticsearch for complex full-text search requirements.
Caching: Redis for session cache and hot data. TTL configuration: 1 hour default for most keys, 24 hours for user profiles.
Background jobs: Celery with Redis broker. Periodic tasks managed via Celery Beat. No separate job service.
File storage: S3-compatible via Cloudflare R2. CDN also via Cloudflare. Chosen for zero egress costs over AWS S3.
Observability: Structured JSON logs to Grafana Loki. Distributed traces via OpenTelemetry to Grafana Tempo. Rejected ELK stack as too heavy.
Infrastructure as Code: Terraform for all cloud resources. Manual console changes are prohibited — all changes must be in IaC.
Secrets management: HashiCorp Vault for all secrets. Secrets must not be stored in environment variables directly — must route through Vault. Non-negotiable policy.
Error tracking: Sentry for error tracking. Integrate into all services. Already paid for.
Code review policy: PRs require 2 approvals minimum. No self-merge on main branch. Main branch is protected. Feature flags required for all risky deployments.
